response:
The Reichstadt Agreement was part of the **League of the Three Emperors** (Dreikaiserabkommen), an alliance between the German Empire, the Russian Empire, and Austria-Hungary. Chancellor Otto von Bismarck was the leader of the German Empire and played a key role in forming this alliance.

Thus, Chancellor Otto von Bismarck and the Reichstadt Agreement were also part of the **League of the Three Emperors**.

**Answer:** The League of the Three Emperors.
